name: express-api
description: Express REST API with SQLite, TypeScript, services, tests

tasks.name: Project scaffold
tasks.description: Initialise the Express project with TypeScript, pin all dependencies, configure tsconfig, and create the app and server entry points

tasks.name: TypeScript types
tasks.description: Define all TypeScript interfaces for request bodies, response objects, database rows, and service inputs and outputs described in PROJECT.md

tasks.name: Database setup
tasks.description: Set up better-sqlite3, create all tables on startup, and export typed query helpers for every entity the application needs

tasks.name: Core service module
tasks.description: Implement the primary business logic with all calculation and data transformation functions operating on typed inputs and returning typed results

tasks.name: Core service tests
tasks.description: Write vitest unit tests for every function in core.ts covering expected outputs, edge cases, and error conditions

tasks.name: Secondary service module
tasks.description: Implement the supporting service that extends or composes the core service to produce the remaining business outputs described in PROJECT.md

tasks.name: Secondary service tests
tasks.description: Write vitest unit tests for every function in secondary.ts including boundary cases and composition with core service outputs

tasks.name: Express routes
tasks.description: Define all Express route handlers, wire them to the service functions, and mount them on the app with the correct HTTP methods and paths

tasks.name: Middleware
tasks.description: Implement a global error handler middleware and a request validation middleware that checks required fields and returns typed error responses

tasks.name: Integration tests
tasks.description: Write vitest integration tests using supertest that send HTTP requests to the Express app and assert status codes, response shapes, and field values

tasks.name: README and API docs
tasks.description: Write a README with setup instructions, environment variables, and a full list of API endpoints with request and response examples

tasks.name: Bug sweep and freeze
tasks.description: Review all listed files for type errors, unhandled promise rejections, and missing middleware wiring then output every fix with file and line references
